description: Classified direct toISOString().slice(0, 10) usages. Remove entries as code moves to formatDateKey/formatUtcDateKey or a stronger domain helper.

entries.reason: Backup drill markdown rows currently use a UTC run date; revisit if operator-local reporting is required.
Job failure notifications are coalesced by UTC process date until product chooses pharmacy-local notification dates.
Drug-master freshness job dedupe currently uses UTC process date; revisit if local operator-day dedupe is required.
Billing month dedupe is derived from canonical monthStart; keep UTC unless billing-month semantics change.
Conference sync billing month is canonical month data; keep UTC unless billing-month semantics change.
PH-OS fee-rule repository serializes backend canonical contract dates; keep UTC unless contract changes.
Billing month parser validates canonical YYYY-MM-01 month keys through UTC round-trip.
